title: Gooey Editor
description: A gui editor and code exporter for fabric.
body:
# This Library Is Currently In Open Testing. Expect Bugs.

Features
* A gui editor that is (currently) only accessable in a development environment.
* A screen that can be saved and loaded to/from json.
* A bunch of included elements such as scrollbars and nine patch textures.
* An easy way to create and register your own elements.

Planned Features
* ~~Undo redo editor functionality.~~ (Added in 0.1.0)
* Config menu.

Potential Future Features
* Resource pack support.
* Data pack support.

As stated above this mod is in open testing so i'm very open to feedback, and if you are a developer and you created an element you think would fit into the default set of included elements contact me on discord through "shadowmaster435"

[Getting Started](https://github.com/shadowmaster435/GooeyEditor/wiki)
